channel.title: The Git Times
channel.description: AI-generated newspaper for builders — daily coverage of trending GitHub projects

item.title: GoClaw Delivers Secure Multi-Tenant AI Agent Platform
item.description: “New technology is not additive; it is ecological. A new medium does not add something; it changes everything.” — Neil Postman

item.title: colleague-skill
item.description: “For a successful technology, reality must take precedence over public relations, for nature cannot be fooled.” — Richard Feynman

item.title: Codex Plugin Brings OpenAI Reviews to Claude Code
item.description: “The medium is the message.” — Marshall McLuhan

item.title: Lightweight CLI Proxy Slashes LLM Token Costs for Developers
item.description: “Technology is not a neutral tool. It is a system that carries its own values.” — Ursula Franklin

item.title: CC Switch Integrates GitHub Copilot in Major Desktop Update
item.description: “Progress imposes not only new possibilities for the future but new restrictions.” — Norbert Wiener

item.title: Open Source AI Dashboard Creates Unified Global Intelligence Monitoring System
item.description: “The purpose of a system is what it does.” — Stafford Beer

item.title: AI Skill Tracks 30-Day Trends Across Social and Tech Platforms
item.description: “The art challenges the technology, and the technology inspires the art.” — John Lasseter

item.title: Pascal Editor Brings Precision 3D Building Design to the Browser
item.description: “We are called to be architects of the future, not its victims.” — Buckminster Fuller

item.title: DeerFlow Orchestrates Sub-Agents for Complex Research and Coding Tasks
item.description: “The factory of the future will have only two employees, a man and a dog. The man will be there to feed the dog. The dog will be there to keep the man from touching the equipment.” — Warren Bennis

item.title: MoneyPrinterV2 Automates Online Income Generation Through Smart Tools
item.description: “Consider what the world would lose if each mind were to do its own indexing.” — Vannevar Bush

item.title: OpenViking Applies Filesystem Model to AI Agent Context
item.description: “Everywhere we remain unfree and chained to technology, whether we passionately affirm or deny it.” — Martin Heidegger

item.title: Offline AI Knowledge System Prepares Users for Disconnected Worlds
item.description: “Technology is anything that wasn't around when you were born.” — Alan Kay

item.title: Mole V1.30 Supercharges Mac Cleanup with Edge-Case Hardening
item.description: “The best material model of a cat is another, or preferably the same, cat.” — Norbert Wiener

item.title: Everything Claude Code Supercharges AI Coding Agents into Production Beasts
item.description: “We shape our tools, and thereafter our tools shape us.” — Marshall McLuhan

item.title: AIRI's Alpha Release Polishes Game-Playing AI Companions for Everyday Use
item.description: “We are as gods and might as well get good at it.” — Stewart Brand

item.title: Superpowers Framework Turns AI Coding Agents into Methodical Engineers
item.description: “The information you have is not the information you want. The information you want is not the information you need.” — Neil Postman

item.title: Attention Residuals Let Transformers Selectively Tap Deeper Layer Wisdom
item.description: “We live in a society exquisitely dependent on science and technology, in which hardly anyone knows anything about science and technology.” — Carl Sagan

item.title: Lightpanda Delivers Zig-Built Headless Browser for Lightning-Fast AI Automation
item.description: “We drive into the future using only our rearview mirror.” — Marshall McLuhan

item.title: Lightpanda: Zig-Powered Headless Browser Turbocharges AI Automation
item.description: “Technology is a gift of God. After the gift of life it is perhaps the greatest of God's gifts.” — Freeman Dyson

item.title: gstack Turns Claude into a Slash-Command Dev Team for Solo Builders
item.description: “We can only see a short distance ahead, but we can see plenty there that needs to be done.” — Alan Turing
